title: Selected State UI Comparison
description: This page compares the current blue gradient with several more restrained selected states. The navbar can use hover-only feedback, while settings sidebars, dropdowns, and segmented controls can use a persistent selected style.

hoverOnly.name: Option A · Hover Only
hoverOnly.description: Best for the navbar. It does not persist active page styling, and only shows a light gray state on hover.

currentBlue.name: Option B · Current Blue Gradient
currentBlue.description: A reference for the current strong blue gradient selected state. It is clear but visually heavy.

pinnedHover.name: Option C · Pinned Hover
pinnedHover.description: Uses the same light gray hover feedback as the persistent selected state, without extra border or shadow weight.

raisedWhite.name: Option D · Raised White
raisedWhite.description: Uses a white surface and soft shadow, closer to the default model configuration card style.

inkOutline.name: Option E · Fine Outline
inkOutline.description: Cleaner than a gray fill, using only a very light outline and translucent white surface.

leftRail.name: Option F · Small Dot
leftRail.description: Keeps the surface close to hover styling, with a small dot on the right as the selected marker.

checkMark.name: Option G · Check Mark
checkMark.description: Better for dropdown menus, where the check mark carries the selected state.
